geographic_restrictions: Business must be located in the WRCC service area (Central Massachusetts)
project_area: Economic development and workforce issues for small businesses
demographic_requirements: Priority given to Woman-owned, BIPOC-owned businesses
eligibility_summary: For-profit entities (sole proprietorship, partnership, corporation, cooperative, or LLC) with less than 10 FTE, located in the WRCC service area. Must be a woman-owned or BIPOC-owned business.
